name: Carrot Cake
recipeIngredient: 6 ounces cream cheese, cut in chunks
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350 degrees. Mix flour, baking soda, baking powder, cinnamon and salt in a large bowl. In a separate bowl, combine sugar and eggs; blend in oil and mix. Stir mixture into dry ingredients. Stir in shredded carrots, chopped nuts and pineapple.
Pour batter into greased and flour-dusted 9-inch by 13-inch baking pan or 10-inch bundt pan. Bake for 45 minutes (55 minutes for bundt pan), or until pick inserted in center comes out clean.
Make Cream-Cheese Frosting: Mix orange zest (or one drop of oil or 1 tsp. dried orange peel), cream cheese and butter thoroughly. Add vanilla and powdered sugar and mix well. Makes enough to frost a 9-inch by 13-inch cake.
Frost cake when it is thoroughly cooled.
